mapper.select: SELECT a.account_id, a.emp_no, a.branch_code, a.role_id, a.login_id, b.name AS branch_name, k.kiosk_id FROM account a JOIN kiosk k ON a.branch_code = k.branch_code JOIN branch b ON a.branch_code = b.branch_code WHERE a.login_id = #{login_id} AND a.password = #{password} AND k.kiosk_id = #{kiosk_id} AND a.role_id = 2 AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' AND k.status = 'NORMAL'
SELECT branch_code, name FROM branch WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY branch_code ASC
SELECT kiosk_id, branch_code, status FROM kiosk WHERE branch_code = #{branchCode} AND status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY kiosk_id ASC
